title: moraea polystachya
intro: Moraea polystachya, also known as the 'Eyebright', is a plant species in the family Iridaceae. It is a type of flowering plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Moraea polystachya is known to have various health benefits, including reducing eye infections and inflammation, improving vision, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
